description: Phase A topology contract — defines the PhaseCapabilityGateService structure that Phase B will generate via cycle-chain/run. Gate reads FT records from xiigen-feature-registry, evaluates portingCandidate flags, and guards phase transitions.

nodes.name: FlowActiveGuard
nodes.description: Verifies FLOW-36 is ACTIVE before evaluating FT records. Returns BLOCKED if FLOW-36 has not run.

nodes.name: PhaseRecordReader
nodes.description: Reads phase requirement documents from xiigen-phase-requirements. Distinguishes NOT_FOUND (first-run) from FAILED (requires diagnosis).

nodes.name: FeatureRecordReader
nodes.description: Reads FT records from xiigen-feature-registry. Evaluates portingCandidate flags across all registered task types.

nodes.name: PortingCandidateEvaluator
nodes.description: Aggregates portingCandidate signals. Counts candidates vs. bootstrap-internal. Returns CAPABILITY_SUMMARY.

nodes.name: CapabilityGapSignalEmitter
nodes.description: Stores GAP_SIGNAL records to xiigen-capability-gap-signals (DNA-8: store before emit). Emits capability.gap.detected queue event.

arbiterConfig.note: scope_isolation required per FC-32 (FK-526); IronRules per safe-default protocol. Phase B generation must include both arbiters on the panel.

prerequisiteChecks: FLOW-36 ACTIVE (FT records exist in xiigen-feature-registry)
